LanguageData.VFED_BombPack_Deployed.description: A deployed bomb pack. It’s armed, and can be detonated with a press of a button.
LanguageData.VFED_BombPack_Deployed.label: deployed bomb pack
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_AntigrainWarhead.desc: A pair of antigrain warheads connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_ArmorPiercing.descrip: A pair of armor-piercing shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_ArmorPiercing.label: remote armor-piercing charge
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Cluster.description: A pair of cluster shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Cluster.label: remote cluster charge
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_EMP.description: A pair of EMP shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_EMP.label: remote EMP charge
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Firefoam.description: A pair of firefoam shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Firefoam.label: remote firefoam charge
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_HighExplosive.descrip: A pair of high-explosive shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_HighExplosive.label: remote charge
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Incendiary.descriptio: A pair of incendiary shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Incendiary.label: remote incendiary charge
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Shrapnel.description: A pair of shrapnel shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Shrapnel.label: remote shrapnel charge
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Smoke.description: A pair of smoke shells connected to a remote triggering mechanism. It can be detonated at will, but the fuse time might vary. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteTrapIED_Smoke.label: remote smoke charge
LanguageData.VFED_TrapIED_ArmorPiercing.description: A pair of armor-piercing shells connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_TrapIED_ArmorPiercing.label: IED armor-piercing trap
LanguageData.VFED_TrapIED_Cluster.description: A pair of cluster shells connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_TrapIED_Cluster.label: IED cluster trap
LanguageData.VFED_TrapIED_Shrapnel.description: A pair of shrapnel shells connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.VFED_TrapIED_Shrapnel.label: IED shrapnel trap
